actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: A theory can either be built upon or destroyed.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: If the ground floor of a theory collapses, the entirety of it does too.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: A theory needs to be constructed over time.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Theories can have cracks in them which can cause them to collapse.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: An unsuccessful theory can have many different structural issues.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: A theory can either be a skyscraper or rubble.
